text: 🛍️ Poundland on the way home — toilet paper, mould killer, toothbrush, peach Red Bull if they have it
🛒 Aldi on the way home — bleach, cheese, potatoes, oats, yoghurt, milk, pasta, red pepper, work meals, baked beans, ready meals
🏥 Lunch break — good time to ring the surgery and book that GP appointment (heart racing / ECG)
